channel.title: Example Source Feed (sample)
channel.description: A local sample feed so the pipeline can be demonstrated offline.

item.title: Sample: regional league announces autumn schedule
item.description: A short source blurb. The pipeline keeps only a link and writes our own one-line summary — it does not store this text as published content.

item.title: Sample: maker releases a new control-oriented paddle
item.description: Source blurb about a product. We verify specs on the official page and add our own comparison reasoning before drafting anything.
